evidence: The paper mentions "Variable importance plot is reported in Figure S5" but never interprets or discusses importance values. Predictor selection uses ROC AUC (discard if < 0.75), Boruta test, and correlation analysis instead. All conclusions focus on habitat dynamics: "88% of the area remaining unchanged over time" and "Grasslands experienced the most dramatic contraction, shrinking by 10.09 ha year-1" with no reference to predictor importance rankings or magnitudes.
